## Meeting Purpose

[Gather feedback on the recent team transition and content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The unexpected team switch from Sydney to Mariana & Mara caused a significant setback, forcing Ambient.AI to re-teach core business context and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Current content is disjointed and lacks the authentic, technical voice required for Ambient.AI's B2B security operator audience.](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [GrowthX will deploy new "agentic pipelines" to fix this, using a larger context window (2k vs. 800-1k tokens) to generate holistic articles and reduce editing time from 30-60 to \~5 minutes.](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [GrowthX will also align the new team with Ambient.AI's campaign-based strategy (e.g., "gun detection for schools") to provide a clear, thematic narrative for internal stakeholders.](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Disrupted Workflow & Content Quality

  - [The unexpected team transition from Sydney to Mariana & Mara created a major disruption, forcing Ambient.AI to repeat the time-intensive process of teaching core business context.](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [**Critical Context Lost:**](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [**Audience:** B2B physical security operators with deep hands-on experience.](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
      - [**Product Nuances:** Differentiating complex AI tech in a noisy market.](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
      - [**Specific Claims:** The "95% alarm reduction" claim is use-case specific (e.g., false positives), not a general statement.](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [**Content Quality Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
      - [Disjointed articles with tangential sections, reflecting the old pipeline's section-by-section generation method.](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
      - [Lacks an authentic, human-like voice, sounding like "marketing machine" output.](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [**Strategic Misalignment:**](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [The new team's keyword-focused approach conflicts with Ambient.AI's campaign-based strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Ambient.AI's Goal:** Organize content around macro themes (e.g., "gun detection for schools") to create a clear narrative for internal teams like sales.](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)

### The Solution: New Pipelines & Strategic Alignment

  - [GrowthX will deploy new "agentic pipelines" to address the core technical issues.](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
  - [**Pipeline Improvements:**](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
      - [**Larger Context Window:** 2,000 tokens per generation (vs. 800-1,000) enables the AI to generate entire articles holistically, solving the "disjointed sections" problem.](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
      - [**Reduced Editing Time:** Aims to cut human editing time from 30-60 minutes to \~5 minutes per article.](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
      - [**Institutionalized Feedback:** All past feedback will be context-engineered into the pipeline's rules, ensuring consistency and preventing knowledge loss during future team changes.](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
  - [**Team Alignment:**](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
      - [Andi will work with Mariana, Mara, and Sydney to align on Ambient.AI's campaign-based content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matthew:**](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
      - [Context-engineer all past feedback and deep-dive notes into the new agentic pipelines.](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
      - [Generate test articles by re-running previously approved content through the new pipeline to validate quality and context retention.](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
  - [**Andi:**](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
      - [Align the new team (Mariana & Mara) with Ambient.AI's campaign-based strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/xn2NrL_t9AjsCZwGJPyQMi_uda1uCUz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
